metaTitle: Cold Rooms For Sale Seattle, WA | Beverage Equipment Traders
metaDescription: New and used cold rooms shipping to Seattle, Washington. Walk-in coolers, cold rooms, and cold boxes for temperature-controlled storage in brewing and bevera. Ships from San Marcos, CA. Rigging and installation available.
h1: Cold Rooms For Sale — Seattle, WA
heroBody: Beverage Equipment Traders ships new and used cold rooms to Seattle and nationwide from our 40,000 sq ft facility in San Marcos, CA. Every piece photographed, documented, and priced. Rigging and installation available at destination.
bodyHeading: Cold Rooms Shipping to Seattle — What to Know
locationParagraph: Freight to Seattle from our San Marcos, CA facility typically runs 2 to 4 business days depending on equipment size and carrier routing. Rigging and installation at destination available on all purchases.
marketParagraph: Beverage Equipment Traders ships to all 50 states and serves buyers across North America. The Seattle market is one of many active markets we work in — contact us regardless of your location and we will advise on current inventory and freight timing.
sidebarBody: Our trade desk responds within one business day. Provide your requirements and we will return current inventory and a freight quote to Seattle.
inventoryHeading: Featured Cold Rooms — Ships to Seattle
faqHeading: Cold Rooms Seattle — Frequently Asked Questions
finalCtaBody: We ship from San Marcos, CA. Every piece photographed and condition-documented. Rigging and installation available in Seattle and nationwide.
